name: Olive Garden Gazpacho Italiano
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Mixed Herbs, chopped very fine
1/4 cup White or Red Onion, diced
1/2 cup Green Bell Pepper, chopped very fine
1/2 cup Cucumber, peeled and chopped very fine
1/2 cup Ditalini or Tubetti pasta, cooked and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
This soup should be served cold at 35-45°F. The vegetable solids and pasta should not be added to the base until time of serving or they may become soggy.
Soup Base Preparation:
1. Process tomatoes, juice, garlic, and herbs in a non-aluminum bowl.
2. Mix in olive oil, vinegar, lemon juice, salt, onion, stock, Tabasco, and sugar (if using).
3. Place the mixture in the fridge for at least 4 hours to chill and allow flavors to marry.
Assembly:
1. Chill vegetables and pasta along with the soup base.
2. To serve: Ensure soup bowls are very cold.
3. Stir the base well and ladle about 6 oz of soup per bowl.
4. Add a good tablespoon of blended veggies and 2 tablespoons of pasta to each bowl.
5. Garnish with croutons, sprinkle croutons with Parmesan cheese, and chopped parsley.
